name: TCS
overview: Tata Consultancy Services is an Indian multinational IT services and consulting company. Largest IT employer in India.
hiringProcess: TCS conducts the National Qualifier Test (NQT) followed by technical and HR interviews for campus hiring.
eligibility: 60%+ throughout academics, no backlogs at time of joining.
preparationTips: Practice TCS NQT mock tests, focus on aptitude, basic coding, and email writing. Prepare for behavioral questions.
